features: 【Complete mini foundation brush Set】EupHHonycs mini travel makeup brush set includes 10 essential brushes: foundation brush, eye shadow brush, powder brush, highlighter brush, blush brush, eyebrow brush, and mascara brush. This mini makeup brushes travel set meets all your makeup needs, ensuring a flawless look every time.

【Quality Materials】Our mini brush set is crafted from premium synthetic fibers, ensuring no shedding. The handles are made from durable phenolic plastic, and the set includes a sturdy PVC makeup brush pouch. This travel size makeup brushes set is perfect for both travel and daily use.

【Portable and Convenient】Designed for on-the-go use, this small makeup brush set features brushes sized between 7.3-10 cm and a compact makeup brush bag measuring 14.5 x 10 x 3.9 cm. The travel makeup brush set with case keeps your brushes organized and protected, making it an ideal choice for travel.

【Ergonomic and Non-Slip Handles】Each brush in this travel makeup brush set is equipped with ergonomically designed handles for a comfortable grip and precise control. The pink makeup brush set ensures you achieve perfect results every time, whether you're using the mini eyeshadow brush or the mini blush brush.

【Versatile and Gentle】This mini travel makeup brush set is suitable for all types of makeup products, including liquid, cream, and powder. The gentle bristles are perfect for sensitive skin, ensuring a comfortable makeup application process. The travel make up brushes set is ideal for both beginners and professionals.
